name: Nebula Rabbit
description: A fluffy glowing cosmic rabbit. Folds its ears when you meet its eyes. Loves mandarins.
special: Encounter rate doubles when Cosmo Mandarin is present. Whimpers when chased away.

name: Crater Bear
description: Strong enough to crack open an asteroid. Returns immediately after being chased away.
special: Low chase success. Only large fruit work as bait.

name: Comet Fox
description: Swift like a shooting star. Skilled at slipping through traps. Targets only the most expensive fruit.
special: Traps almost never work. Highest reward when captured.

name: Dust Mouse
description: A mouse small as dust. One is harmless; they come in swarms.
special: Appears 1-3 at once (difficulty parameter). Encounter rate halves if Thorn Lemon is in the field.

name: Void Jelly
description: A cosmic jellyfish drifting in the void. Its clear tentacles wipe out the taste of any fruit they touch.
special: Hard to lure with bait. Beautiful to look at but devastating.
